title: ajania pallasiana
intro: Ajania pallasiana, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum or Manchurian wormwood, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ajania pallasiana include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Ajania pallasiana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
